parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: Generate a 60-second fishing YouTube Short script. Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact structure: {"hook": "opening line to grab attention", "script": "full narration text", "cta": "call to action at end", "tags": ["tag1", "tag2", "tag3"]}. Topic ideas: fishing tips, species facts, gear advice, casting techniques, lure building/DIY lures, or tackle making. Make it engaging and informative!

nodes.name: Smart Footage Selection
nodes.notes: Selects footage based on script content

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
set -e

# Get data from n8n
SCRIPT='{{ $json.script }}'
CLIPS='{{ JSON.stringify($json.selectedClips) }}'
CLIP_DURATION={{ $json.clipDuration }}

# Paths
AUDIO_FILE="/tmp/narration_{{ $execution.id }}.wav"
OUTPUT_FILE="/tmp/final_short_{{ $execution.id }}.mp4"
CONCAT_FILE="/tmp/concat_{{ $execution.id }}.txt"
SUBTITLE_FILE="/tmp/subs_{{ $execution.id }}.srt"

# Save audio from binary data (assumes previous node saved it)
echo "{{ $binary.audio.data }}" | base64 -d > "$AUDIO_FILE"

# Parse clips array and create concat file
echo "$CLIPS" | jq -r '.[]' | while read -r clip; do
  echo "file '$clip'" >> "$CONCAT_FILE"
  echo "duration $CLIP_DURATION" >> "$CONCAT_FILE"
done

# Generate basic SRT subtitles (split script into timed segments)
cat > "$SUBTITLE_FILE" << 'EOF'
1
00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:10,000
{{ $json.hook }}

2
00:00:10,000 --> 00:00:55,000
{{ $json.script }}

3
00:00:55,000 --> 00:01:00,000
{{ $json.cta }}
EOF

# Assemble video with FFmpeg
ffmpeg -y \
  -f concat -safe 0 -i "$CONCAT_FILE" \
  -i "$AUDIO_FILE" \
  -filter_complex "
    [0:v]scale=1080:1920:force_original_aspect_ratio=increase,crop=1080:1920,
    subtitles='$SUBTITLE_FILE':force_style='FontName=Arial Bold,FontSize=32,PrimaryColour=&HFFFFFF,OutlineColour=&H000000,Outline=3,Alignment=2,MarginV=100'[v]
  " \
  -map "[v]" -map 1:a \
  -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 23 \
  -c:a aac -b:a 128k \
  -t 60 \
  -movflags +faststart \
  "$OUTPUT_FILE"

# Output the file path
echo "$OUTPUT_FILE"

parameters.name: snippet

nodes.name: Upload to YouTube
nodes.notes: Requires YouTube Data API v3 OAuth2 credentials
